1875000.name: The Forest
1875000.description:
Welcome to The Haunted Grounds,

You recently bought a Haunted House for a very cheap Price, But there is something else living there that your not aware of.

Your main mission is to Search around the house and complete the objectives.

There are Interactable Objects you can pick up such as Axes, Flashlights, Boxes and more!

Please Note: The Game is considered as a Demo for now since it only takes 10 - 25minutes to complete

Please note, This is my First Project on Steam, Expect some bugs and glitches., I will be doing regular updates of the game, If you have any Issues? You can go to the Support Section and send a Email or Open a Thread in the Community Hub. Currently the Game is in Early Access! This is not the full version of the game! Full Version expected to be Released in future updates Thanks for your Patience.

Current Windows Build: win-1.9.5
Current VR Build: N/A

- Exploration and completion challenge.
- Multiplayer Will be added once the game has fully been released.
- Early Access
- Game has Graphics Settings (Potato, Low, Med, High, Ultra)
- HTC VR Support (In Development)
1875000.supported_languages:
英语*, 日语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
